name: Sassy Bean and Bulgur
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Lightly grease a baking dish with sunflower oil.
3. In a large bowl, combine the kidney beans, cooked bulgur, brown rice, sliced mushrooms, sliced carrots, chopped scallions, tomato sauce, oregano, and salt.
4. Stir in the spinach leaves until well mixed.
5. Transfer the mixture to the prepared baking dish.
6. Place the dish in the oven for 20 minutes or until heated through.
7. Serve on a bed of spinach leaves.
